subject: I’ve got a new book
body:
Mozination -

I release my new book $100M Leads in 6 weeks. Saturday August 19th.

This is your official invitation.

I'll make the book available live with some (insane) exclusive bonuses. I've been working on these bonuses since before $100M Offers (4+ years). They're goooood.

But that's not all…

You're getting this because at some point you subscribed to hear about this first. So as promised, I want to deliver on that and reward you guys.

So I've gone ahead and done two things:

1. I've asked my team to pre-register you for the live event for free. That way your seat is secured without having to do any additional steps.

(We've had over 208,000 people register for this. Today.)

Good news: there's nothing you need to do. You'll see a registration email shortly. So keep an eye out.

2. Finally, (and keep this between us) I'm also going to be sending some private emails in the lead-up to the event. Just to give you some behind-the-scenes goodies & an inside look at what's to come.

That is all.

Alex

PS - Here's a video sneak peek.
